title: Chauharjan Devi Temple
tagline: Chauharjan Devi Temple — spiritual town of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Chauharjan Devi Temple also known as Barahi Devi Temple is a Hindu (Sanatan Religion) temple of mother goddess Barahi or Chauharjan Devi, located in village Chauharjan Parasrampur
overview.description: Chauharjan Devi Temple also known as Barahi Devi Temple is a Hindu (Sanatan Religion) temple of mother goddess Barahi or Chauharjan Devi, located in village Chauharjan Parasrampur in Pratapgarh, Uttar Pradesh. The temple is located on the holy bank of river Sai.

topPlaces.name: Babupatti
topPlaces.description: Babupatti is a village in the Raniganj tehsil of Pratapgarh district, Uttar Pradesh state, India. Babu Patti is a variant spelling.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Chauharjan Devi Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Chauharjan Devi Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Chauharjan Devi Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Prayagraj Airport (Bamrauli) (55 km) and the nearest railway station is Prayagraj Junction (49 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Chauharjan Devi Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Chauharjan Devi Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Chauharjan Devi Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Chauharjan Devi Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
